quality_gate.note: Stride dev server not running — browser-based quality gate skipped. Static analysis only. TypeScript+ESLint confirm 0 build errors.

improvements_found.observation: journey-canvas-view.tsx:345,363 — handleAddTouchpoint and handleAddStage are declared outside useCallback but referenced in a useCallback's dep array, causing the dep to change on every render. This can cause the keyboard shortcut handler useCallback to re-subscribe on every render.
improvements_found.design_principle: React performance: stable references in useCallback deps prevent unnecessary re-subscriptions
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Wrap handleAddTouchpoint and handleAddStage in their own useCallback hooks (same fix pattern as flow-canvas.tsx:302,319 which correctly uses useCallback for handleAddStep/handleAddSection).

improvements_found.observation: flow-canvas.tsx:11 — addEdge is imported from @xyflow/react but never used. Pre-existing lint warning.
improvements_found.design_principle: Code hygiene: unused imports increase bundle size marginally and add noise
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Remove addEdge from the import destructure at line 11.
